name: rich-select
description: A searchable single-select whose options are filtered SERVER-SIDE: the query binds l:model.debounce, the server re-filters the catalog and re-renders the listbox (the canonical wire/htmx typeahead, no client filtering). The selected value lives server-side and is set via the $set magic action. Server-first WIRE component (ADR-0012); replaces the <lv-rich-select> Lit island. WAI-ARIA APG combobox + listbox.
docs: Register RichSelectComponent as a PROTOTYPE-scoped @Bean (a fresh instance per stateless wire call). Seed `allOptions` from your repository in the constructor or a @LievitRender hook (the seed list is placeholder data). The query filters server-side via l:model.debounce; selection sets the `selected` field via $set('selected', '<value>'). The rendered hidden input (name=...) submits the selection in a plain POST form. The `@LievitComponent(template="lievit/rich-select")` name assumes the .jte landed under lievit/; adjust freely once copied (the source is yours).
